positive: A whimsical scene of friendly woodland creatures—a badger reading a book to a fox and a squirrel—sitting under a giant, glowing mushroom. Storybook illustration style, soft lighting, warm color palette, highly expressive characters, Studio Ghibli aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, aggressive, harsh shadows, photorealistic, industrial
